column1: Hey abbie, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yeaa perfect, both are dope and have been popular this year
how many ppl in your group so far?
Loved “Yeaa perfect, both are dope and have been popular this year”
dope thats a solid group, we all from the same school?
nice yea we have a few groups from UMass, gonna be a good time
putting this info together for you right now, how soon were you looking to get things started?
We just are looking to compare some prices and then as soon as possible!
perfect I got you, cool if I send it through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if it came through! can hook it up with the black friday deal you see there too
I think it's taking it's time to come over
Could you email me over Punta canas as well?
yea of course! thats actually where I'll be. highly recommend
just added it to the same thread
Loved “yea of course! thats actually where I'll be. highly recommend”
lmk how the groups feelin! would be good to get on the black friday deal
So how the payment works is it broken up?
yea! so to reserve your spot and the deal its a $200 deposit. then you get through the remainder of the calendar year to pay it off
essentially through the month of Dec
I will share this with the gc!
If we are waiting on the 3rd person but want to get the Black Friday deal is it possible to still book the trip?
yea for sure we can get started with everyone thats ready
awesome. we leaning towards punta cana?
ayee. will be dope to meet y'all for sure
And it'll make sure we have someone we can trust in Punta Cana lol
yea of course! got you covered
our full team will be there too ready to help you with everything you need
did you want me to get the reservation started for tomorrow?
okay word I got you. is it still 6 ppl or just 3 now?
At the moment we have 4 for sure and 3 still thinking
hey rq, did you want to do a 5 night or 4 night?
hey! just emailed the 4 night reservation over
yep! can change the dates if you need, just lmk
okay dope! lmk if you need any help getting on the reservation tn
If our 4th person isn't ready to book the hotel today is that okay?
That's cool let's get the others situated, when will the 4th be able to?
And there was 3 others that were a maybe right
Okay, sounds good. I think she might not be ready till next week.
Hi, unfortunately it seems I'm the only one ready to book tonight. Would others still be able to get the Black Friday discount if they did it tomorrow or Sunday?
wanna hook it up for y'all
we'll honor the same package for them since youre holding down the fort with the deposit tn
Just a question! Is the booze cruise added on to our trip with the Black Friday deal?!
Hi! Last night my friend put her deposit down and now she has received an email saying her trip has been cancelled. What should she do?
Hey she texted me too, I have a meeting with our ops team at 10 and will see whats up! I think she made two slots
hey yea she's all set, I think she accidentally made multiple accounts. but we deleted the others
Oh gosh! Thank you for helping her!!
hey hey. is it just gonna be 3 of you for that room? theres an open slot rn the 4th one hasn't been reserved
Hi, Sorry! It's been a crazy week. We're still looking for a 4th person but if we do not find one we are okay with paying more money.
word just wanted to make sure youre all good!
heyy just checkin in, hows finding a 4th roommate going?
Unfortunately it looks like it might be the three of us for a while
People are goin to work out the winter to see if they can pay for the trip
word just keep me posted. rooms are def slim so if there were any new rooms lookin to be added we'll want to know soon fs
heyy Abbie checkin in, we still on the hunt for a 4th?
Ahh, all good. we may have to slim the reservation down to just you 3 soon. it'll add a small balance for the occupancy change
Okay no worries! Let me reach out to the girls who are still thinking about it and get back to you on what they say!
okay dope! how many other girls was it again? potentially
hey hey, checkin in! any word from the other girls
hey any update on finding a 4th, or we just gonna run it with you 3?
Hi! I think we're gonna run it with just us three
theres gonna be a $24 price difference on that just a heads up
Thank you! The girls and I are okay with that

Hi! My friend Sophia is one of the 3 people staying in the room. Shea seems to be having trouble getting into her account to pay the $24. Is there anyway you can help her? She's really stressing about the whole thing.
All good. Is she using the correct email to log in?
Or did she forget which it was
She forgot which is was unfortunately
Hi, is the website glitching today? It says the money I paid is unpaid.
Hey, had someone else mention that as well. do you mind screenshotting what you can see so I can show our UI team
thank you! you can disregard that. will make sure it gets fixed
Hey checkin in, any update on Sophie? Just need to her to get that $24 payment in so we can finalize your pre departure
Hi! I think she still get into her account. Is there any other way she can send you the money?
hey my b I missed this last night
whats happening when she tried to get into her account? did she forget her password
She's telling me she isn't allowed to get into her account anymore
Can I give her your number and you help her? Just cause I feel like somethings getting lost in communication when she's telling me about not being able to get in.
lol how is that eve possible
yea have her text me thats cool
I'm honestly so confused on the whole thing lol
lol all good we'll get to the bottom of it
hey can you have Soph upload her flight info, so we can schedule your airport transfers
She's not the best with all this sorry
all good lol as long as she gets it in
hey she ever get back to you?
Yes, she said she was on it. Did she not do it?
I think she just did it
she on the same flight as you?
cool just got that added in for her
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
I thought we already had the booze cruise added since we completed the whole thing early?
its all in there, but lmk if you ant to add any of the nightclub party pass events
Okayy!! Are the night clubs open bar?
And when will the booze cruise be happening? Like day and time?
yeaaa comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
Ohh okay! Let me ask the girls
hey hey just lmk if we wanna add those before you go
How much is the coco bong add on?
coco bongo is 79 comes with round trip transportation and open bar
Is the event location safe? If we are getting transportation does that mean we will be leaving the resort?
Yea! Theres transportation right from the resort to the nightclubs that we all take
We all go directly there and directly back. And most of our events are like private to spring breakers
Do you know which day we will be doing the booze cruise? We are trying to plan.
We are considering doing the Maroca/ pearl club but are unsure if it'll be clash with the booze cruise time.
the booze cruise will be the 15th and 16th. you'll most likely be on the 16th one
its early in the say so it wont clash with any of the party pass events
you can buy it when you get here, just let my homie Taylor know youre looking to grab those when youre here
safe travels today tho. bout to be a lit week
Hi, do you have any information on where our ride is? We've been waiting for 30 minutes and no one's telling us anything.
Hey where are you currently? You'll be looking for the Go Blue Tours booth
Okay, we got on the bus. They were just looking for someone I think to drive us.
Hi it's been going good! Just wondering what time till should we be at the lobby to be picked up for our 1pm flights?
Head to the lobby there's a board with all of the departure times. But if you don't see it let me know!
